description: Upper left corner of a bill of release given by Abū Saʿd Mevorakh to his maternal aunt Gharb; also mentions his mother. Concerning the rent of a dwelling and the inheritance of Berakhot al-Zayyāt. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
